{{Quote|I'm no smuggler, Farral. I'm a licensed salvager. I pick the stuff up, sell what's legal on the open market, and sell the rest back to the Navy.|Sreethyn|<ref name="Salvager" />}}
[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] '''Sreethyn''' was the captain of ''[[The Lucky Find]]'' around the time of the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. He was licensed to recover [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] surplus from waste dumps.

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=A Salvager's Run|book=Imperial Sourcebook|reprint=1}} {{1st}}
